howItWorks.intro: This vo2 max calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Health metrics are general guidelines. Consult your healthcare provider for personalized medical advice.

faq.q: What is a good VO2 max?
faq.a: 40-50 ml/kg/min is good for adults. Elite athletes reach 60-80.

faq.q: How can I improve VO2 max?
faq.a: Interval training and consistent aerobic exercise improve VO2 max.
